sections.content:
Great progress! The exit moved LEFT successfully:
- Exit orange: rows 45-46, cols 19-23 (was at cols 29-33, now at 19-23)
- Player: rows 31-32, cols 21-22
The exit is now at cols 19-23, and the player is at cols 21-22. They're aligned horizontally! The exit just needs to move UP to reach the player.
The exit is at rows 45-46, player at rows 31-32. The exit needs to move UP by about 14 rows to reach the player's row.
Looking at the area around the player:
- Rows 28-29: GGGGGGGGGGGG (gray, no gap)
- Rows 30-38: GGGGGGGGGGGc (gray with charcoal on right edge)
- Row 31: GGGWGGGGGGGc (player W at col 21)
- Row 32: GGwWWGGGGGGc (player W at cols 21-22)
The exit is at cols 19-23, which overlaps with the player at cols 21-22. If I move the exit UP, it should reach the player.
But wait, looking at the structure, rows 30-38 have charcoal at the right edge (col 29). The exit is at cols 19-23, which is in the gray area. So the exit should be able to move UP through the gray area.
Let me move the exit UP 14 rows to reach the player at rows 31-32.
Actually, the exit is 5 rows tall (orange at 2 rows, blue at 3 rows). If the exit orange is at rows 45-46, the exit blue is at rows 47-49. To get the exit to the player at rows 31-32, I need to move UP so that the exit overlaps with the player.
If I move UP 14 rows, the exit orange would be at rows 31-32, which is exactly where the player is. Let me try that.

sections.label: ASSISTANT
sections.content: World model updated: Exit is at rows 45-46, cols 19-23. Player is at rows 31-32, cols 21-22. They're horizontally aligned! I just need to move the exit UP ~14 rows to reach the player. This should complete the level.
